API Collection# ExceptionHandling Constants

## [Topics](/documentation/exceptionhandling/exceptionhandling-constants#topics)

### [Constants](/documentation/exceptionhandling/exceptionhandling-constants#Constants)

[`let NSStackTraceKey: String`](/documentation/exceptionhandling/nsstacktracekey)The key for fetching the stack trace (an [`NSString`](/documentation/Foundation/NSString) object) in the [`userInfo`](/documentation/Foundation/NSException/userInfo-swift.property) dictionary of the [`NSException`](/documentation/Foundation/NSException) object passed into one of the delegate methods described in [NSExceptionHandlerDelegate](/documentation/ExceptionHandling/nsexceptionhandlerdelegate#Logging-and-handling-exceptions).[`let NSUncaughtRuntimeErrorException: String`](/documentation/exceptionhandling/nsuncaughtruntimeerrorexception)Identifies an Objective-C runtime error.[`let NSUncaughtSystemExceptionException: String`](/documentation/exceptionhandling/nsuncaughtsystemexceptionexception)Identifies an uncaught system exception.## [See Also](/documentation/exceptionhandling/exceptionhandling-constants#see-also)
